tape: Risk-on drift: June CPI cool at 3.5% (vs 3.8% est), VIX down to 15.35 and Nasdaq +1% (tech leading despite research's -0.4 tech bias) on strong Goldman (+7.6%)/JPM/BAC prints, though the Dow lags on IBM -25% (AI-spend earnings warning) and soft Citi/Wells; oil is the one unresolved leg (WTI ticked back up ~$80 on lingering US-Iran headlines), so research.json's risk_off framing keeps looking stale against quant_regime's calm_drift -- next research run should reconsider.

alerts.headline: Cool CPI (3.5%) + VIX 15.35 + Nasdaq +1% = clean risk-on drift, but oil ticked back to ~$80 on renewed US-Iran headlines (conflicting with the toll-scrapped read from earlier today). Regime reads calm_drift, not risk_off; oil/Iran is the only live tail into the close.

Held/book's best gainer now ~+13% (~$14.20) -- move widened from +7.2% earlier, driven by ICONIQ's disclosed 610k-sh/$7.2M buy (7/8) + director buys. Already-priced backer accumulation, NOT a fresh un-priced catalyst; post-lockup Form 144 (1.75M sh, 7/8) + Lightspeed sale (7/9) distribution overhang persists. Carried, no boost.

Held, no fresh news -- insider buys (Bhappu $968k 7/7, Hansen 7/8) + VAC $1.9B deal + $725M DoW financing all already in the score; bounced ~$13.2. Risk-flagged: active $300M ATM + Chalmers Form 144 SALE (7/9) make insider picture mixed, Lorentzian k-NN -0.75. No boost.

Held/HELD-radar 10.73 but risk.json says DO-NOT-ADD: $200M standing S-3 baby-shelf on a sub-$100M post-+48%-pump name. Only fresh items are the 7/7 WrapShield launch + ATF ruling + ~$1.2M orders -- positive but immaterial. Keep flag, do not increase.

Watchlist: no fresh item -- ~$5.8B all-stock Valaris deal (15.235 ratio) carries a DOJ second request, parties won't certify before 7/31 so earliest close ~9/29; ~53% dilution + binary-vote risk. Stock ~$5.28. Concur with risk.json: do-not-chase.

Watchlist: no fresh catalyst -- ~$10.44 sits ABOVE mean analyst PT after the 6/24 $100M offering (13.5M sh at $7.41). Real dilution alongside the real ABS-201 Phase 1 story; keep flagged so it is not bought as a fresh breakout.

AVOID (carried): 12-for-1 reverse split effective TODAY (new CUSIP G8071C137) for Nasdaq $1 compliance on an unfunded AI/crypto-pivot pump; radar 5.2 below line. FinBERT +0.919 is a misattributed generic-market headline -- disregard.
AVOID (carried): ~30% dilution via $50M registered direct (27.6M sh at $1.81) + $9.2M Lilly PIPE closed 6/26; stock ~$1.72 below the offer, CEO's 7/7 buy came after the raise. Radar 5.17, below line.
AVOID (carried): textbook pump-and-dump -- HK microcap ~$0.23 (6/12) to >$10 (6/16), now ~$3.60. No fundamental catalyst; radar 5.1, below line. Reject on pump veto.

Top non-held scan name (5.24, below line): GlobalHarvest bought ~$7.9M more (7/9) on top of 7/6+7/8 clusters, but per risk.json this is takeover-style accumulation that triggered a poison pill -- the insider score is mis-attributed, not management conviction. No dilution/pump veto but below the buy line; no boost.

movers.note: ~+13% (~$14.20) on ICONIQ + director buys; already priced, not fresh.
+7.6% on a strong Q2 print, leading a mixed bank tape (JPM/BAC up, Citi -5.8%/Wells -3.3%).
~-25% on an AI-spend earnings warning; drags the Dow, not held.
Bounced ~$13.2; energy leg cooling as the tape reads risk-on, not risk_off.
